title: Avatar group
code:
<gds-avatar-group>
    <gds-avatar
      src="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?img=1"
      size="s"
      alt="Person 1"
    ></gds-avatar>
    <gds-avatar
      src="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?img=2"
      size="s"
      alt="Person 2"
    ></gds-avatar>
    <gds-avatar
      src="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?img=3"
      size="s"
      alt="Person 3"
    ></gds-avatar>
    <gds-avatar size="s">+2</gds-avatar>
</gds-avatar-group>
